interpretation: BGE Raw vs. Centered: Centering embeddings eliminates the language cone effect, shifting the inter-theme cosine similarity to negative levels (-12.15%) and successfully orthogonalizing different schemas down to an SDR Overlap of 11.17%, which lies well below the 15% random noise floor. This guarantees complete protection against cross-schema collision in the CA3 Hopfield network, while retaining a strong 30.24% intra-theme SDR overlap.
